post.subject: I've Fucked up
post.body: I have no money. Yes the bastards at work arent going to be able to give me the money until at least thurs. I think the guy was even implying that they shouldnt really cos it was my mistake. I should think not. If i had been told to use a different clock-in number i would have used it, but i wasnt told nor given one so how the hell is it MY fault. FUCKERS! Now i have no money - apart from the £7 i managed to find out of mostly 20ps in my room. *UPDATE* Thanks to a good friend - i now i have £20 in my bank - i make it last until thurs (when i better get my money from work!)
